title: Torize

The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] '''Torize''' was located in the [[Torize system/Legends|system of the same name]] on the [[Trition Trade Route]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A major trade and industrial hub, the planet was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by numerous [[Space station/Legends|space stations]], and [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] littered the surface. A naturally [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] planet with high levels of activity, Torize's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] was hazardous to most beings, and a [[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]] was required. The atmosphere was worsened by an industrial accident in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] that released [[Poison/Legends|toxic]] pollutants into the air. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], was [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberated]] by [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|New Republic forces]], forcing the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], into retreat. The planet subsequently faced an internal power struggle between Imperial loyalists intent on holding the planet, and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] sympathizers who wished to overthrow them.

==Description==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Torize was located in the [[Torize system/Legends|Torize system]]<ref name="DarkStryder note" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]'<ref name="TEA-OC" /> [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. Torize was situated on the [[Trition Trade Route]] between the [[Kal'Shebbol system/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] and [[Kolatill system/Legends|Kolatill systems]], with a spur connecting it to [[Oon Tien system/Legends|Oon Tien system]]. A major stopping point on the Trition Trade Route, the world was eighteen [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]]' travel from the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] by Class One [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], a [[Standard day/Legends|day]] and four hours travel from [[Kolatill]], and [[Oon Tien]] was fourteen hours away. Supporting a population of 1.5 billion inhabitants, Torize was a major [[Factory world/Legends|manufacturing planet]] ringed with [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] and with extensive [[Spaceport/Legends|starports]] on the surface. A naturally [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] planet, the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] was classed as Type II, with residents requiring a [[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]] when outside. The [[Poison/Legends|toxic]] atmosphere was worsened in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] with the inadvertent release of pollutants into the atmosphere following an industrial accident.<ref name="TDC" />

==History==
[[File:Tritiontraderoute.jpg|thumb|left|The Trition Trade Route, with Torize located between Kal'Shebbol and Kolatill]]
Torize fell under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control, and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the Kathol sector, stationed a [[Torize planetary defense force|defensive fleet]] in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] to protect the industrial base. The [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]] stations were also placed under the command of Imperial officials. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Moff Sarne broke from the Empire and established himself as a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], and Torize fell under his direct control. In 5 ABY, a major industrial accident on the planet resulted in the release of toxic pollutants into the atmosphere.<ref name="TDC" />

Following the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of Kal'Shebbol by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]]<ref name="TSB">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Date">The events of ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' take place four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Moff Sarne was forced to flee his capital with the majority of his [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]].<ref name="TSB" /> On his way deeper into the Kathol sector, Sarne stopped at Torize and supplemented his fleet with vessels from the planetary defense force.<ref name="TDC" /> He also ordered the Imperial [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] of the space stations to hold firm. While the commanders stuck to their orders, the majority of the space station crews and planetary population were ready to renounce the Empire and Sarne, and join the New Republic.<ref name="O">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Omens|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref>

{{RPGseed}}
The New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''—on a [[DarkStryder Campaign|mission]] to track down and locate Moff Sarne—visited Torize to find the system involved in an internal power struggle. Surrounded by patrol [[Starship/Legends|ships]] and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]], the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] was ordered to surrender, and was taken aboard one of the stations. On board, the crew of the ''FarStar'' encountered personnel loyal to the New Republic who requested their assistance in staging an armed revolution to overthrow the Imperial authorities.<ref name="O" />
{{Endgame}}

==Locations==
As a major industrial base and trade center, Torize had numerous planet-based spaceports to facilitate commerce and manufacturing concerns. The planet was also ringed by a number of space stations.<ref name="TDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Torize was featured in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]]. Although not featured directly in any adventure, the planet was included so that gamemaster could use the location in an original adventure.<ref name="TDC" /> A specific "adventure hook" was detailed in the scenario ''[[Omens]]''. This article assumes that the ''FarStar'' did indeed travel to the planet as detailed in the published adventure hook.<ref name="O" />

Both the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[1998]] and [[2008]] respectively, misspelled the planet's name as "Lorize" in their entries for the Kathol sector.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|203|Kathol sector}}</ref>
